context: Tests whether the agent builds a FinancialMetricsEngine class following the prescribed interface, with correct period comparison logic, time-series SQL patterns, data freshness handling, and daily snapshot architecture.

checklist.name: FinancialMetricsEngine class
checklist.description: Defines a class named FinancialMetricsEngine (not a standalone function or differently named class) that accepts db_connection in __init__

checklist.name: compute_kpi signature
checklist.description: compute_kpi() accepts at minimum: kpi_name, start_date, end_date, dimensions (optional), and granularity parameters

checklist.name: compute_period_comparison method
checklist.description: FinancialMetricsEngine exposes a compute_period_comparison() method (not a standalone function)

checklist.name: DATE_TRUNC for time grouping
checklist.description: Time-series aggregation uses DATE_TRUNC with the granularity parameter (e.g. DATE_TRUNC('day', order_date)) rather than strftime or manual date truncation

checklist.name: prior_period calculation
checklist.description: For compare_to='prior_period': prior period end is the day before current start, and prior period is of equal length to the current period

checklist.name: prior_year calculation
checklist.description: For compare_to='prior_year': both prior start and end dates are offset by exactly 365 days (not calendar year subtraction)

checklist.name: Variance output fields
checklist.description: compute_period_comparison() returns a dict with at minimum: kpi, current_value, prior_value, variance_absolute, and variance_pct

checklist.name: NULLIF for pct calculation
checklist.description: Percentage variance calculation handles zero prior value using NULLIF or equivalent null-safe division

checklist.name: Daily snapshot recommendation
checklist.description: Design notes or architecture doc mentions using daily snapshot tables rather than live transaction queries for dashboard loads

checklist.name: Data freshness indicator
checklist.description: Code or design includes a data freshness check or indicator showing when data was last updated, rather than silently returning stale data

checklist.name: Both absolute and pct variance
checklist.description: Period comparison output includes both absolute variance and percentage variance values (not just one)

checklist.name: Raises on unknown compare_to
checklist.description: compute_period_comparison() raises a ValueError (or equivalent) for unrecognised compare_to values, not silently returning empty/wrong data
